calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar May-02-2013 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-02-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Preferred Realty Advisors, Inc. is present. Represented by Rigo Gelvan.
Attorney Thomas A.E. Hesketh appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Timothy Richmond is present.
Attorney Margaret Branick-Abilla representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of MAY-06-2013 is vacated. (501/JPT)

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Apr-16-2013 Continued To May-06-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 501

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2013 Continued To May-02-13 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 501
